message.content:
@startuml
title US004 - As Administrator, I want to search for users

actor Administrator
participant SearchUsersByParamsRoute
participant InDto : SearchUserDto
participant UsersController
participant SearchUsersByParamsService
participant ISystemUserRepo
participant ILUserProfileRepo
participant user : SystemUser
participant SystemUserMapper
participant usersFound : List<SystemUser>
participant usersFoundDto : List<UserDto>
participant userDTO : OutputUserDto
participant usersJson : ResponseEntity

note right of Administrator
The parameters (name, email, profile and function) will be in the query of the request. At least, one of them must be typed or chosen.
end note

note right of SearchUsersByParamsRoute
1 GET /users?name={name}&email={email}&profile={profile}&func={func}
end note

note right of InDto : SearchUserDto
2 searchUsersByTypedParams(InDto)
end note

note right of SearchUsersByParamsService
3 searchUsersByTypedParams(InDto)
end note

note right of ISystemUserRepo
opt (if the request has a profile)
4 result : existsByUserProfile(profile)
end note

alt (depending on which params came from inputDto, the service class will invoke the respective method)
5 findAllBy...
6 create()
7 usersFound : List<SystemUser>
8 create()
end alt

note right of usersFound
usersFoundDto : List<UserDto>
end note

loop (for which user found at the list)
9 model2Dto(user)
10 create()
userDTO : OutputUserDto
11 userDTO
12 add(userDTO)
end loop

note right of usersFoundDto
13 usersFoundDto
14 create(usersFoundDto)
end note

note right of usersJson
usersJson : ResponseEntity
end note

note right of userDTO
userDTO : OutputUserDto
end note

note right of usersJson
usersJson : ResponseEntity
end note

note right of user
user : SystemUser
end note

note right of SystemUserMapper
SystemUserMapper
end note

note right of SearchUsersByParamsRoute
SearchUsersByParamsRoute
end note

InDto : SearchUserDto
